---
title: "Blog Posts"
---
 
## Crossref API Tutorials
* [March 26th 2026: Introduction to the JSON API response format](/blog/CR_API_Tutorials/JSON.qmd)
* [March 30th 2026: Troubleshooting JSON browser viewing issues](/blog/CR_API_Tutorials/troubleshooting-browser-JSON-view.qmd)

## IGDORE ReproDucibilitea Summaries
* [March 5th 2025: Open code for open science?](/blog/IGDORE/openCodeForOpenScience.qmd)
